description_long: This house is a modern residential structure surrounded by a dense ring of trees, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The building features a mix of flat and gable roofs, with the central section showcasing a flat roof and large glass windows, while the side wings have pitched, reddish-brown tiled roofs. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or tan material, likely stucco or concrete, with extensive use of glass for natural lighting. The house includes multiple outdoor terraces and balconies, some with glass railings, and a visible swimming pool area. The landscaping is minimal beyond the tree barrier, emphasizing the integration of the house with its wooded surroundings. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and an emphasis on blending indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern house with flat and gable roofs, large glass windows, and surrounded by dense trees. Features include terraces, balconies, and a swimming pool, all set within a private, wooded environment.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house partially obscured by trees, highlighting the flat-roofed central section and the reddish-brown gable roofs of the side wings.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a clear look at the front facade, with large glass windows, the main entryway, and the flat roof section most prominent.
description_view_2: View 2 reveals the rear of the house, including the swimming pool area, upper terrace, and more of the glass railing details.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the side of the house, showing the flat roof, extensive windows, and the dense tree barrier encircling the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, minimal steps, and a covered porch with clean, modern lines and no ornate decoration.
